children.text:
# Hi, Anonymous! With the help of this app you can kill your time, meet new people and flirt anonymously even with your friends. No one will ever find out your real name, because AntiChat replaces your personal data with random symbols each time you send a message.

To find out how this thing works press all the buttons you see and explore all the benefits of anonymous social networking, or open the [Settings] tab on the main screen and then press the [FAQ: Tutorial] button. I also kindly ask you to Review my work in the App Store or Google Play at least if you like the idea of this unprofitable app. See you later! (c) Nick Halavins
